message:
Refactor neo to_kafka to use librdkafka utils config path

Move neo to_kafka off the legacy configuration wrapper and onto the
librdkafka utils configuration path.

Changes:
- add producer_configuration plus make/configure helpers in
  librdkafka_utils
- reuse shared option/secret application logic for producer and consumer
- switch neo to_kafka startup to use make_producer_configuration and
  configure_producer_or_request_secrets

This keeps callback lifetimes explicit in neo code and reduces reliance on
legacy configuration plumbing in the new executor path.
